dependencies: Copper and petroleum-based resin products subject to significant price volatility
Global supply chain disruptions affecting component availability
Ukraine and Russia are significant global producers of raw materials including copper, aluminum, palladium and neon gases
risks: Concentration risk in best cost countries
Just-in-time delivery system vulnerable to disruptions
Single subcomponent shortage can force production cessation
Global supply chain disruptions from geopolitical events
Commodity price volatility particularly copper and resins
Increased logistics costs and longer transit times

regulatory_risks: Increasingly stringent vehicle safety regulations globally
Fuel economy and greenhouse gas emissions regulations
EPA proposed rules requiring up to 67% of light-duty vehicles to be all-electric by 2032
California Air Resources Board rules requiring all new passenger cars to be zero-emission by 2035
EU regulations requiring all new passenger cars and vans to have zero CO2 emissions by 2035
OECD Pillar Two Framework requiring minimum effective tax rate of 15%
NHTSA authority to require product recalls for safety concerns
Environmental, health and safety regulations compliance
Climate change and GHG reduction requirements
Restrictions on incorporation of chemical substances into products
DOT guidance on automated driving systems testing and deployment
Potential requirements for autonomous vehicle systems to receive regulatory approval
Export control restrictions on advanced computing semiconductors to China
Trade tariffs and import quotas including potential new tariffs on Mexico, Canada and China
Changes to free trade agreements like USMCA
Mexico statutory minimum wage increases and labor reforms
Sanctions compliance including EU, US and other sanctions against Russia
Data privacy regulations including new EU regulations
FDA approval requirements for certain products
Tax law changes and transfer pricing regulations

sanction_risks: Potential for further sanctions and retaliatory measures by Russia
Export control restrictions targeting China for advanced semiconductors
Economic sanctions impacting operations in sanctioned countries
Restrictions on energy supplies from Russia to Europe
